div.p:
The Foreign Offices of Iraq, Syria, Lebanon, Trans Jordan and Egypt, in notes to American Diplomatic Missions in their respective countries, drew the attention of the United States Government to
various resolutions on Palestine approved by the Political Committee of the Arab League. The notes, not printed, were of similar import and form and were transmitted to the Department by the Missions at various dates between September 22 and October 1, 1947. A note of somewhat different character was received from the Saudi Arabian Foreign Office; see telegram 431, October 15, from Jidda, page 1184.
